prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第84名 （2026年），近年排名稳定在75–84之间；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现在明显负面舆情或投档断档记录中；抖音关注度一般，未见异常热度信号；电气工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A-，均为电力行业核心学科，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类专业社会热度持 续高热（2024年均为高热推荐）；本省2026年物理类考生约13.7万，较2025年13.95万略降，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合扩招 约10.2%使竞争加剧、考生数略降及电气专业持续高热等因素，在2025年基准13949名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约14853名，区间14353–15353名。

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16220 → 10890 → 12526 → 13723 → 13949, with a continuous backward shift in the last 3 years, accumulating a shift of about 3059 places; the 2025 baseline is about 13949; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 47, 48, 48, 48, and 49 respectively, showing a slight increase; the 2026 plan is 54, an expansion of about 10.2% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), with recent rankings stable between 75–84; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps; Douyin attention is average, with no abnormal heat signals; Electrical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, strongly attracting related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power majors remain highly popular socially (both highly recommended in 2024); the provincial Physics Category examinees in 2026 are about 137,000, slightly down from 139,500 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as an expansion of about 10.2% intensifying competition, a slight decrease in examinee numbers, and sustained high popularity of electrical majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 13949, the ranking is expected to shift backward slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14853, with a range of 14353–15353.
